case_title: TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION VS. IVIE ELECTRIC SERVICE et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $195.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT IVIE ELECTRIC SERVICE
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT IVIE ELECTRIC SERVICE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-28-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-12-2003
DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RE ORIGINAL LEASES AND PERSONAL GUARANTY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF JUDGMENT ( EQUIPMENT VALUATION ) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CAUSE CALLED, THE COURT ORDERED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IVIE ELECTRIC SERVICE POSSESSION OF THE FOLLOWING DESCRIBED PROPERTY, TO WIT: 1 XEROX 3060 ENGINEERING COPIER ( PROPERTY VALUE $ 2,000.00 ), OR IN CASE A DELIVERY OF SAID PROPERTY TO PLAINTIFF CANNOT BE HAD, THEN THAT THE PLAINTIFF HAVE AND RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT $140.40, THE VALUE OF SAID PROPERTY, $3,317.19 DAMAGES, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $195.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,172.49, $ 140.40 IS THE INTEREST . SEE SCANNED DOCUMENTS.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ORIGINAL SUMMONS RETURNED. FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY CAPITAL CORPORATION SERVED MAR-04-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT IVIE ELECTRIC SERVICE
